description: Active anomaly windows for one well and TD stage.
sql:
SELECT * FROM (
WITH active_manifest AS (
  SELECT active_run_id, name, stage_num_td, algorithm_version
  FROM featurestore:merged_anomaly_processing_manifest_v2
  WHERE status = 'active'
    AND algorithm_version = 'ds-v1'
    AND name = :well_name
    AND stage_num_td = CAST(:stage_num AS DOUBLE PRECISION)
)
SELECT
  e.event_id,
  e.name AS well_name,
  e.stage_num_td AS stage_num,
  e.anomaly,
  e.anomaly_display,
  e.start_ts,
  e.end_ts,
  e.duration_sec,
  CASE
    WHEN e.anomaly = 'pressure_surge' THEN 'rgba(211,84,0,0.20)'
    WHEN e.anomaly = 'pump_rate_drop' THEN 'rgba(40,120,181,0.20)'
    WHEN e.anomaly = 'mid_stage_shutdown' THEN 'rgba(48,52,59,0.20)'
    ELSE 'rgba(42,157,111,0.20)'
  END AS color
FROM active_manifest m
JOIN featurestore:merged_anomaly_events_v2 e
  ON e.processing_run_id = m.active_run_id
 AND e.name = m.name
 AND e.stage_num_td = m.stage_num_td
 AND e.algorithm_version = m.algorithm_version
ORDER BY e.start_ts, e.anomaly
) q
